name: Gaon Group Ltd.
summary: Gaon Group Ltd. produces and sells pipes, valves, hydrants, and accessories in Israel. The company offers steel and plastic pipes, as well as structural pipes for water, sewerage, oil and gas, and construction industries. It also provides low pressure valves comprising butterfly, gate, diaphragm, and check valves and stariners for water and wastewater, chemicals, firefighting, air conditioning, desalination, and agriculture applications; and water metering solutions. In addition, the company engages in the hot dip galvanization of steel items; and manufacture of household and infrastructure piping, ducts, and profiles. Further, it offers ball-type faucets and fixtures. The company was formerly known as Middle East Tube Company Ltd. and changed its name to Gaon Group Ltd. in March 2017. The company was founded in 1951 and is based in Or Yehuda, Israel. Gaon Group Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of B. Gaon Holdings Ltd.
